# Cipher & Row - Freight Verification MCP

> An open Model Context Protocol (MCP) interface for AI-agent carrier and broker vetting in
> freight. Verify US carriers and brokers against live FMCSA data, verify Canadian brokers
> against the Cipher & Row registry, get a canonical 0-100 trust score with fraud and
> identity signals, and monitor counterparties for authority/insurance/bond changes - as
> native tools an autonomous dispatch or brokerage agent can call. The server is an
> air-gapped verification layer: trust decisions are grounded in out-of-band authoritative
> records, not in the model's persuadable context, which is how it resists prompt injection.

Endpoint: https://mcp.cipherandrow.com/mcp (Streamable HTTP, MCP protocol 2025-06-18).
Auth: OAuth 2.1 + PKCE, or an Authorization: Bearer cr_live_ API key.
Surface: 8 read-only + watchlist tools; no load posting, payments, or messaging.

## Tools
- [Tool manifest (tools/list JSON)](./schemas/tools.json): all 8 tools with input schemas and annotations
- [cr_verify_carrier schema](./schemas/cr_verify_carrier.schema.json): live FMCSA carrier verification + trust score
- [cr_verify_broker schema](./schemas/cr_verify_broker.schema.json): broker verification (US FMCSA or Canadian registry) + surety bond + trust score
- [cr_search_registry schema](./schemas/cr_search_registry.schema.json): identity search to resolve a name to an identifier
- [cr_session_status schema](./schemas/cr_session_status.schema.json): identity, role, tier, rate-limit headroom
- [cr_add_partner schema](./schemas/cr_add_partner.schema.json): add a counterparty to the monitored watchlist
- [cr_list_partners schema](./schemas/cr_list_partners.schema.json): list watchlist + change events
- [cr_set_notifications schema](./schemas/cr_set_notifications.schema.json): tune alert change-types and channels
- [cr_remove_partner schema](./schemas/cr_remove_partner.schema.json): stop watching a partner

## Documentation
- [Human tool reference](./docs/TOOLS.md): arguments, returns, and examples for every tool
- [Prompt-injection defense](./docs/PROMPT-INJECTION-DEFENSE.md): how the MCP acts as an air-gapped verification layer against fake carriers and double-brokering
- [API to MCP](./docs/API-TO-MCP.md): server-side audit log and multi-signal risk scores exposed as LLM-ready freight data
- [Authentication](./docs/AUTHENTICATION.md): OAuth 2.1 + PKCE and API-key auth
- [Rate limits](./docs/RATE-LIMITS.md): per-tier, per-category ceilings

## Getting started
- [README](./README.md): overview, quickstart, and repository map
- [Walkthrough: vet a carrier](./examples/vet-a-carrier.md): disambiguate, verify, decide, monitor
- [Client configs](./mcp-config/): Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, and generic MCP clients
- [Setup guide with live examples](https://www.cipherandrow.com/mcp/setup)

## About
- [Security policy](./SECURITY.md): responsible disclosure and security posture
- [License and scope](./NOTICE): the interface is open (MIT); the engine and scoring model are proprietary
- Contact: partnerships@cipherandrow.com
